prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild dormitory, medium shot. Haru Brightford, a feminine quartermaster in a neat vest and guild sash, holds a glowing ledger tablet to track arcane fluctuations. She gestures to Haru Starling, an androgynous mage in layered blue robes surrounded by small floating spell tags, inviting them to help stabilize a flickering mana rift in the air. Brightford maintains a focused, welcoming expression. Cinematic lighting, high-quality fantasy art style, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild dormitory shot. Haru Starling, the androgynous mage, steps forward to precisely align the floating spell tags with the mana rift. Haru Brightford supports the effort by adjusting the ledger's energy field to anchor the spell. They work in tandem as the flickering light stabilizes and fades into a soft, calm glow. Consistent identities, camera angle, and room mood, no text, no watermark.
